headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Question
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Is Biogen (BIIB) Priced Near Fair Value After Its 57% Run?
summary: Biogen stock has delivered a strong 57.5% return over the past year, and with the current valuation checks painting a mixed picture rather than a clear bargain or clear overvaluation, investors are weighing how much of the recent Alzheimer’s and immunology news is already reflected in the price. Over the last 12 months, Biogen has returned 57.5%, which puts a spotlight on whether today’s share price still offers an attractive entry point or mainly reflects recent optimism. On the upside,...

headline: Biogen (BIIB) To Share New Alzheimer’s Data At AAIC 2026
summary: Biogen (NasdaqGS:BIIB) plans to present new investigational data from its Alzheimer’s portfolio at AAIC 2026. The company will share detailed Phase 2 CELIA results for diranersen, a tau-targeting therapy. Biogen will also present real-world evidence on subcutaneous lecanemab, including usage patterns and long-term outcomes. For investors tracking Biogen, the AAIC 2026 agenda centers on two core Alzheimer’s assets that are central to the company’s neurodegeneration focus. Diranersen targets...
